common.rates_disclaimer: Kudaden canji suna kusa da gaske kuma za a iya adana su. Farashin na ainihi yana sabunta kowane minti.

welcome.tagline: Biyan kuɗi na ƙetare iyaka da sauri da aminci ta hanyar Stellar blockchain
welcome.feature_instant_desc: Aika kuɗi a fadin Afirka cikin daƙiƙa
welcome.feature_multi_desc: NGN, GHS, KES, USD da sauransu

register.title: Buɗe asusun
register.subtitle: Shiga tare da miliyoyin masu aika kuɗi a Afirka
register.success: An buɗe asusun! Jakar kuɗinka tana shirye.

passwordReset.forgot_subtitle: Shigar da imel ɗin ku; za mu aika hanya idan asusu yana nan.
passwordReset.forgot_success_toast: Duba imel ɗin ku don mataki na gaba.
passwordReset.reset_subtitle: Shigar da sabuwar kalmar sirri don asusunku.
passwordReset.reset_success_toast: An sabunta kalmar sirri. Yanzu zaka iya shiga.
passwordReset.missing_token: Wannan hanya ba ta da kyau. Nemi sabuwa daga shafin shiga.
passwordReset.error_generic: Wani abu ya yi kuskure. Sake gwadawa.

dashboard.no_transactions: Babu ma'amaloli tukuna. Aika biyan kuɗi na farko!

send.title: Aika Kuɗi
send.qr_invalid: Adireshi na Stellar mara amfani a cikin lambar QR
send.qr_hint: Nuna ga lambar QR ta adireshi na Stellar
send.camera_permission_denied: Ba a ba da izin ga kamera. Dubi awon ku.
send.camera_not_found: Ba a sami kamera a cikin wannan na'ura ba
send.camera_error: Ba na iya shiga kamera ba

auth.pin_create_desc: Ka karantawa PIN 4-6 jiya domin ba da izin jajiya
auth.pin_format_help: Yi amfani da 4 zuwa 6 jiya kawai
auth.pin_you_entered: PIN da ka shigar da shi
auth.pin_mismatch_error: PINs ba su dace ba. Sai batta.
auth.pin_warning: Ka tuna PIN nka. Ba zaka iya dawo da shi ba.
auth.pin_verified: PIN an tabbatar da shi! Aika jajiya...
auth.pin_max_attempts: Kokarin da yawa ba su nasara ba. Sai batta sannan.
auth.pin_security_note: Ba a aiko PIN nka ko ajiya shi a saerve namu ba

receive.title: Karɓi Kuɗi
receive.subtitle: Raba adireshi ko lambar QR don karɓar biyan kuɗi
receive.warning: Aika XLM ko kadarorin Stellar kawai zuwa wannan adireshi

profile.title: Bayanan Kai
profile.frequent_contacts: Tuntuɓin Da Ake Amfani Da Su
